page_metadata.biotools__summary: FlaGs (Flanking Genes) web- and command-line tool that clusters neighbourhood-encoded proteins into homologous groups and outputs the identity of the groups, a graphical visualization of the gene neighbourhood and its conservation, and optionally, a phylogenetic tree annotated with flanking gene conservation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FlaGs (Flanking Genes) web- and command-line tool that clusters neighbourhood-encoded proteins into homologous groups and outputs the identity of the groups, a graphical visualization of the gene neighbourhood and its conservation, and optionally, a phylogenetic tree annotated with flanking gene conservation.
